response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership or distributed systems architecture at scale.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and DevOps
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Minimal exposure to cloud architecture, hardware, or storage systems per job description
